text.title: Feature Flag Types and Lifecycle Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Flag created for rollout now used to gate paid features; cleanup never happens.
antipattern.fix: Rename + reclassify as permission flag; reset retire_by.

antipattern.symptom: 13 flags marked owner=null in service export; nobody cleans them.
antipattern.fix: Make owner mandatory; audit step fails if missing.

antipattern.symptom: Release flag live for 9 months; both branches still in code, divergent.
antipattern.fix: Add window check to weekly audit (see feature-flags-services-testing).
